name: react-doctor
label: React Doctor
desc: A daily guardian that scans your React app, fixes the worst issue, and opens a PR.
description: Every morning around 6am my local time, scan this project with `npx react-doctor@latest`, pick the single most severe issue it reports, fix it, verify the fix, and open a PR. Make the changes in a fresh git worktree created off the main branch so my working checkout is never touched. If a previous React Doctor PR is still open (unmerged), don't open another one that day - just refresh its status and still report the score. Track the open and merged PRs on the loop's kanban board, and report react-doctor's health score every day.
